note: WAPDA/LESCO bills the ENTIRE month's units at the rate of whichever band the total consumption falls into (not a progressive/incremental slab). Crossing a band boundary re-rates all units, causing a sharp jump - most dramatic between 200 and 201 units.

extraCharges.note: These are illustrative default rates based on commonly published NEPRA/DISCO charge structures. VERIFY against a current real bill or NEPRA notification before relying on exact amounts - FC Surcharge and GST base in particular vary by DISCO and change periodically.
